2182150.name: Beat the Machine: Rebooted - Soundtrack
2182150.description:
After defeating T.O.M (Totally Overpowered Machine), Sector VIII is no longer being attacking by the swarm of nodes attempting to take over Syncopia's mainframe. Now that Damon has completed the mission, it is time to relax and chill to the Beat the Machine: Rebooted soundtrack at your own leisure. The high intensity and bass boosted soundtrack is now available for listening on Steam.

Update: 1.1
Now includes DLC soundtracks

Contents include:
  • Full Soundtrack in MP3 format
  • Full Soundtrack in uncompressed WAV format
